matrix_description: Paper-eval matrix v1 covering the 4-dimensional comparison framework defined by doc 12 §4.7. 12 cells: 1 baseline + 3 Class 1 intent-recovery (D1) + 8 Class 2 candidate-source × ordering × interaction (D2 × D3 × D4). Plan: 13_paper_eval_matrix_plan.md.

cells.description: No experiment-mode overrides — every dimension uses the deployment's policy default. Reference cell for paper figures.
Class 1 intent recovery via direct mapping (PR #79).
Class 1 intent recovery via rule-only candidate selector.
Class 1 intent recovery via LLM-assisted candidate generation.
Class 2 candidate generation via static_only (LLM disabled). Direct-select interaction model. No deterministic ordering (source_order applies but is meaningful only under scanning).
Class 2 candidate generation via LLM-assisted. Direct-select interaction model.
Scanning interaction model with source_order ordering — candidates announced in candidate-source-natural order.
Scanning interaction model with deterministic ordering — class2_scan_ordering_rules permutes candidates before announcement (PR #110).
Direct-select interaction model — all candidates announced in one TTS utterance, user picks by index. Production default.
Scanning interaction model — AAC sequential per-option presentation (PR #104+). Source-order ordering (default) — paired cell C2_D3_SCAN_DETERMINISTIC isolates the ordering contribution.
Multi-turn refinement (doc 11 Phase 6.0; opt-in policy class2_multi_turn_enabled=true) — user picks parent C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE then refines bedroom. Direct-select interaction model.
cells._policy_overrides_note: This cell requires the policy flag to be flipped on at deployment time. The orchestrator (Phase 1) must verify the policy before starting this cell's trials and skip with a clear log if the flag is off.

cells.description: Multi-turn refinement timeout path — user picks parent then no response on refinement turn → caregiver escalation. silence ≠ consent invariant exercised.

anchor_commits._purpose: Filled in by the orchestrator at sweep start so each digest is reproducible. matrix_file_sha is the git SHA of THIS file at sweep start; scenarios_dir_sha is integration/scenarios/; policy_table_sha is common/policies/policy_table.json.
